name: ManicEMU
subtitle: All-in-one retro game emulator for iOS
description: Automatically updated AltStore/SideStore source for ManicEMU from github.com/Manic-EMU/ManicEMU.

apps.name: ManicEMU
apps.subtitle: All-in-one retro game emulator
apps.localizedDescription:
Manic EMU is an all-in-one retro game emulator for iOS with a clean UI and buttery-smooth gameplay.

Supported platforms:
Nintendo: 3DS, N64, NDS, GBA, GBC, GB, NES, FDS, SNES, Virtual Boy, Pokémon Mini
Sony: PS1, PSP
Sega: Dreamcast, Saturn, Master System, Game Gear, SG-1000, 32X, Mega-CD, Genesis/MegaDrive
Other: DOOM, J2ME (Java), and more coming soon!

Key Features:
• Unlimited saves: manual & 50 auto-save slots
• 5x speed control
• Cheat codes library
• Retro filters & custom skins
• RetroAchievements integration with Hardcore Mode
• iCloud sync across devices
• Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, WebDAV, SMB support
• Native Joy-Con, DualShock, Xbox controller support
• AirPlay mirroring

versions.localizedDescription:
• Added JAVA (J2ME) support
• Added DOOM support (powered by prboom)
• Added XeniOS Link
• Added skin button sound effects support
• Fixed multiple issues caused by incorrect file paths on macOS
• Fixed an issue where multi-file ROMs were not uploaded during iCloud sync
• Fixed an issue where multi-line cheat codes did not work
• Fixed incorrect C button mapping for MCD and 32X
• Fixed an issue where UI could not be controlled via external controllers on iOS 26.3.1
• Various other fixes and improvements

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used for in-game audio recording features.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to import game ROMs and media.
